title: Bug in subselect (or condition)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE unitTestFuzz (X VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, Y INT, Z FLOAT, W DATE DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO unitTestFuzz VALUES ('Test2', 5, NULL, NULL);
SELECT * FROM unitTestFuzz WHERE Y IS NULL OR Z > (SELECT AVG(Z) FROM unitTestFuzz WHERE W IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Subselect with null or condition on column B
